scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) if [ -z "$RENDER" ]; then echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "[preinstall] Render npm detected — clearing stale node_modules so npm cannot re-run cached dep install scripts (e.g. esbuild binary skew); pnpm rebuilds in scripts/render-build.sh" >&2; rm -rf node_modules ;; esac'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -n "$RENDER" ]; then bash scripts/render-build.sh; else pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build; fi'
scripts.start: sh -c 'cd artifacts/api-server && exec env NODE_ENV=production node_modules/.bin/tsx server/index.ts'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
